2324480.name: Time Ocean Demo
2324480.description:
In the vast 'Sea of Time', control the time to twist the logic and find the answer.

Time Ocean is a puzzle game that you use time manipulation to overcome obstacles and reach a goal. Help the water drop that fell alone in the vast sea of time to solve the difficult puzzles and reach the last point of the sea.

However, you should always be careful about the Time Paradox.
